description_long: This is a fictional starfighter with a sleek, elongated fuselage and four prominent wings arranged in an X-formation, each equipped with a laser cannon at the tip. The body is primarily white with red and orange markings, and the wings feature mechanical details and panel lines. Two large cylindrical engines are mounted on each side of the fuselage, with visible exhaust ports at the rear. The cockpit is forward-mounted, enclosed with a transparent canopy, and features a small astromech droid socket behind it. The tail section is compact, with no traditional vertical stabilizer, and the landing gear is not visible. The overall design is futuristic, with a blend of smooth and angular surfaces, and the asset appears to be inspired by science fiction spacecraft.
description: A white and red futuristic starfighter with four X-shaped wings, forward cockpit, and dual rear engines, featuring sci-fi detailing and weaponry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical X-shaped wing arrangement with visible laser cannons.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit placement, and the stacked engine nacelles along with the wing-mounted weaponry.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dual engine exhausts, astromech droid socket, and the mechanical details of the wings and tail section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the same fuselage and wing configuration with visible panel lines and markings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing X-configuration with four straight wings, no visible winglets, and no pronounced dihedral or anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Four cylindrical jet engines mounted on the wings, two per side.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a compact, low-profile vertical stabilizer integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a transparent canopy and an astromech droid socket directly behind.
